industrial.label: Costs & Expenses
industrial.description: Total costs of sales and operating expenses for the period.

industrial.label: Operating Revenue
industrial.description: Amount of revenue recognized from goods sold, services rendered, insurance premiums, or other activities that constitute an earning process. Includes, but is not limited to, investment and interest income before deduction of interest expense when recognized as a component of revenue, and sales and trading gain (loss).

industrial.label: Other Revenue
industrial.description: Revenues from the sale of other goods or rendering of other services, not elsewhere specified in the taxonomy; net of (reduced by) sales adjustments, returns, allowances, and discounts.

industrial.label: Excise and Sales Taxes
industrial.description: Amount of excise and sales taxes included in revenue.

industrial.label: Total Revenue
industrial.description: Amount of revenue recognized from goods sold, services rendered, insurance premiums, or other activities that constitute an earning process. Includes, but is not limited to, investment and interest income before deduction of interest expense when recognized as a component of revenue, and sales and trading gain (loss).

industrial.label: Operating Cost of Revenue
industrial.description: The aggregate costs related to goods produced and sold and services rendered by an entity during the reporting period. This excludes costs incurred during the reporting period related to financial services rendered and other revenue generating activities.

industrial.label: Other Cost of Revenue
industrial.description: Other costs incurred during the reporting period related to other revenue generating activities.

industrial.label: Total Cost of Revenue
industrial.description: The aggregate costs related to goods produced and sold and services rendered by an entity during the reporting period. This excludes costs incurred during the reporting period related to financial services rendered and other revenue generating activities.

industrial.label: Total Gross Profit
industrial.description: Aggregate revenue less cost of goods and services sold or operating expenses directly attributable to the revenue generation activity.

industrial.label: Selling, General & Admin Expense
industrial.description: The aggregate total costs related to selling a firm's product and services, as well as all other general and administrative expenses. Direct selling expenses (for example, credit, warranty, and advertising) are expenses that can be directly linked to the sale of specific products. Indirect selling expenses are expenses that cannot be directly linked to the sale of specific products, for example telephone expenses, Internet, and postal charges. General and administrative expenses include salaries of non-sales personnel, rent, utilities, communication, etc.

industrial.label: Research & Development Expense
industrial.description: Amount of expense for research and development. Includes, but is not limited to, cost for computer software product to be sold, leased, or otherwise marketed and writeoff of research and development assets acquired in transaction other than business combination or joint venture formation or both. Excludes write-down of intangible asset acquired in business combination or from joint venture formation or both, used in research and development activity.

industrial.label: Exploration Expense
industrial.description: Exploration expenses (including prospecting) related to oil and gas producing entities and would be included in operating expenses of that entity. Costs incurred in identifying areas that may warrant examination and in examining specific areas that are considered to have prospects of containing oil and gas reserves, including costs of drilling exploratory wells and exploratory-type stratigraphic test wells. Exploration costs may be incurred both before acquiring the related property (sometimes referred to in part as prospecting costs) and after acquiring the property. Principal types of exploration costs, which include depreciation and applicable operating costs of support equipment and facilities and other costs of exploration activities, are: (i) Costs of topographical, geographical and geophysical studies, rights of access to properties to conduct those studies, and salaries and other expenses of geologists, geophysical crews, and others conducting those studies. Collectively, these are sometimes referred to as geological and geophysical or "G&G" costs. (ii) Costs of carrying and retaining undeveloped properties, such as delay rentals, ad valorem taxes on properties, legal costs for title defense, and the maintenance of land and lease records. (iii) Dry hole contributions and bottom hole contributions. (iv) Costs of drilling and equipping exploratory wells. (v) Costs of drilling exploratory-type stratigraphic test wells.

industrial.label: Depreciation Expense
industrial.description: The current period expense charged against earnings on long-lived, physical assets not used in production, and which are not intended for resale, to allocate or recognize the cost of such assets over their useful lives; or to record the reduction in book value of an intangible asset over the benefit period of such asset; or to reflect consumption during the period of an asset that is not used in production.

industrial.label: Amortization Expense
industrial.description: Amount of amortization expense for finite-lived intangible asset. Excludes goodwill and capitalized cost for software to be sold, leased, or marketed.

industrial.label: Depletion Expense
industrial.description: The noncash expense charged against earnings to recognize the consumption of natural resources.

industrial.label: Depreciation and Amortization
industrial.description: The aggregate expense recognized in the current period that allocates the cost of tangible and intangible assets over their useful lives.

industrial.label: Other Operating Expenses / (Income)
industrial.description: The net amount of other operating income and expenses, the components of which are not separately disclosed on the income statement, from items that are associated with the entity's normal revenue producing operations.

industrial.label: Impairment Charge
industrial.description: Amount of impairment loss for asset. Includes, but is not limited to, tangible and intangible assets and goodwill.

industrial.label: Restructuring Charge
industrial.description: Amount of expenses associated with exit or disposal activities pursuant to an authorized plan. Excludes expenses related to a discontinued operation or an asset retirement obligation.

industrial.label: Other Special Charges / (Income)
industrial.description: Amount of restructuring charges, remediation cost, and asset impairment loss.

industrial.label: Total Operating Expenses
industrial.description: Generally recurring costs associated with normal operations except for the portion of these expenses which can be clearly related to production and included in cost of sales or services. Includes selling, general and administrative expense.

industrial.label: Total Operating Income
industrial.description: The net result for the period of deducting operating expenses from operating revenues.

industrial.label: Interest Expense
industrial.description: Amount of interest expense classified as operating.

industrial.label: Interest & Investment Income
industrial.description: Amount of operating interest income, including, but not limited to, amortization and accretion of premiums and discounts on securities.

industrial.label: Other Income / (Expense), net
industrial.description: Amount of income (expense) related to nonoperating activities, classified as other.

industrial.label: Other Gains / (Losses), net
industrial.description: Amount of realized and unrealized gain (loss) on investment.

industrial.label: Total Other Income / (Expense), net
industrial.description: The aggregate amount of income or expense from ancillary business-related activities (that is to say, excluding major activities considered part of the normal operations of the business).

industrial.label: Income Before Equity Method Investments
industrial.description: Amount of income/loss from continuing operations before income from equity method investments.

industrial.label: Income from Equity Method Investments
industrial.description: Amount of income (loss) for proportionate share of equity method investee's income (loss).

industrial.label: Total Pre-Tax Income
industrial.description: Amount of income (loss) from continuing operations, including income (loss) from equity method investments, before deduction of income tax expense (benefit), and income (loss) attributable to noncontrolling interest.

industrial.label: Current Income Tax Expense (Benefit)
industrial.description: Amount of current income tax expense (benefit) pertaining to taxable income (loss) from continuing operations.

industrial.label: Deferred Income Tax Expense (Benefit)
industrial.description: Amount of deferred income tax expense (benefit) pertaining to income (loss) from continuing operations.

industrial.label: Income Tax Expense
industrial.description: Amount of current income tax expense (benefit) and deferred income tax expense (benefit) pertaining to continuing operations.

industrial.label: Net Income / (Loss) Continuing Operations
industrial.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from continuing operations including portion attributable to the noncontrolling interest.

industrial.label: Net Income / (Loss) Discontinued Operations
industrial.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from a discontinued operation including the portion attributable to the noncontrolling interest. Includes, but is not limited to, the income (loss) from operations during the phase-out period, gain (loss) on disposal, gain (loss) for reversal of write-down (write-down) to fair value, less cost to sell, and adjustments to a prior period gain (loss) on disposal.

industrial.label: Extraordinary Income / (Loss), net
industrial.description: Description of the gains (losses), after tax, arising from an event or transaction that is both unusual in nature and infrequent in occurrence when considered in relation to the environment in which the entity operates and which represents the portion assigned to noncontrolling interest, if any. This amount is the income statement amount which is allocable to that ownership interest in subsidiary equity which is not attributable to the parent (noncontrolling interest, minority interest).

industrial.label: Other Adjustments to Consolidated Net Income / (Loss)
industrial.description: Amount after tax and reclassification adjustments of other comprehensive income (loss).

industrial.label: Gain (Loss) on Sale of Properties, Net of Tax
industrial.description: Amount of gain (loss) on sale or disposal of property, net of applicable income taxes.

industrial.label: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss) Attributable to Parent
industrial.description: Amount after tax and reclassification adjustments of OCI attributable to parent.

industrial.label: Comprehensive Income (Loss) Attributable to Parent
industrial.description: Amount after tax of increase (decrease) in equity from transactions and other events, attributable to parent.

industrial.label: Other Comprehensive Income (Loss) Attributable to NCI
industrial.description: Amount after tax and reclassification adjustments of OCI attributable to noncontrolling interests.

industrial.label: Comprehensive Income (Loss) Attributable to NCI
industrial.description: Amount after tax of increase (decrease) in equity from transactions and other events, attributable to noncontrolling interests.

industrial.label: Comprehensive Income (Loss)
industrial.description: Amount after tax of increase (decrease) in equity from transactions and other events/circumstances from net income and OCI. Includes portion attributable to NCI.

industrial.label: Consolidated Net Income / (Loss)
industrial.description: The consolidated profit or loss for the period, net of income taxes, including the portion attributable to the noncontrolling interest.

industrial.label: Preferred Stock Dividends Declared
industrial.description: Amount of paid and unpaid preferred stock dividends declared with the form of settlement in cash, stock and payment-in-kind (PIK).

industrial.label: Net Income Attributable to Redeemable NCI
industrial.description: Amount after tax of income attributable to redeemable noncontrolling interest.

industrial.label: Net Income Attributable to Nonredeemable NCI
industrial.description: Amount after tax of income attributable to nonredeemable noncontrolling interest.

industrial.label: Net Income / (Loss) Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
industrial.description: Amount of Net Income (Loss) attributable to noncontrolling interest.

industrial.label: Other Adjustments to Net Income / (Loss) Attributable to Common Shareholders)
industrial.description: The aggregate value of preferred stock dividends and other adjustments necessary to derive net income apportioned to common stockholders.

industrial.label: Net Income / (Loss) Attributable to Common Shareholders
industrial.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities; of income (loss) available to common shareholders.

industrial.label: Weighted Average Basic Shares Outstanding
industrial.description: Number of [basic] shares or units, after adjustment for contingently issuable shares or units and other shares or units not deemed outstanding, determined by relating the portion of time within a reporting period that common shares or units have been outstanding to the total time in that period.

industrial.label: Basic Earnings per Share
industrial.description: The amount of net income (loss) for the period per each share of common stock or unit outstanding during the reporting period.

industrial.label: Weighted Average Diluted Shares Outstanding
industrial.description: The average number of shares or units issued and outstanding that are used in calculating diluted EPS or earnings per unit (EPU), determined based on the timing of issuance of shares or units in the period.

industrial.label: Diluted Earnings per Share
industrial.description: The amount of net income (loss) for the period available to each share of common stock or common unit outstanding during the reporting period and to each share or unit that would have been outstanding assuming the issuance of common shares or units for all dilutive potential common shares or units outstanding during the reporting period.

industrial.label: Weighted Average Basic & Diluted Shares Outstanding
industrial.description: Average number of shares or units issued and outstanding that are used in calculating basic and diluted earnings per share (EPS).

industrial.label: Basic & Diluted Earnings per Share
industrial.description: The amount of net income or loss for the period per each share in instances when basic and diluted earnings per share are the same amount and reported as a single line item on the face of the financial statements.  Basic earnings per share is the amount of net income or loss for the period per each share of common stock or unit outstanding during the reporting period.  Diluted earnings per share includes the amount of net income or loss for the period available to each share of common stock or common unit outstanding during the reporting period and to each share or unit that would have been outstanding assuming the issuance of common shares or units for all dilutive potential common shares or units outstanding during the reporting period.

industrial.label: Cash Dividends to Common per Share
industrial.description: Aggregate dividends declared during the period for each share of common stock outstanding.

financial.label: Other Gains / (Losses), net
financial.description: Amount of realized and unrealized gain (loss) on investment.

financial.label: Loans and Leases Interest Income
financial.description: The aggregate interest and fee income generated by: (1) loans the Entity has positive intent and ability to hold for the foreseeable future, or until maturity or payoff, including commercial and consumer loans, whether domestic or foreign, which may consist of: (a) industrial and agricultural; (b) real estate; and (c) real estate construction loans; (d) trade financing; (e) lease financing; (f) home equity lines-of-credit; (g) automobile and other vehicle loans; and (h) credit card and other revolving-type loans and (2) loans and leases held-for-sale which may include mortgage loans, direct financing, and sales-type leases.

financial.label: Investment Securities Interest Income
financial.description: Amount of operating interest income, including amortization and accretion of premiums and discounts, on securities subject to state, federal and other income tax.

financial.label: Deposits and Money Market Investments Interest Income
financial.description: Interest income derived from funds deposited with both domestic and foreign financial institutions including funds in money market and other accounts.

financial.label: Federal Funds Sold and Securities Borrowed Interest Income
financial.description: The aggregate interest income earned from (1) the lending of excess federal funds to another commercial bank requiring such for its legal reserve requirements and (2) securities purchased under agreements to resell.

financial.label: Trading Account Interest Income
financial.description: Interest and dividend income on securities that are bought and held principally for the purpose of selling them in the near term ("trading securities") and on securities measured at fair value through earnings.

financial.label: Other Interest Income
financial.description: Amount of interest income earned from interest bearing assets classified as other.

financial.label: Total Interest Income
financial.description: Amount of operating interest income, including, but not limited to, amortization and accretion of premiums and discounts on securities.

financial.label: Deposits Interest Expense
financial.description: Aggregate amount of interest expense on all deposits.

financial.label: Short-Term Borrowings Interest Expense
financial.description: The aggregate interest expense incurred on short-term borrowings including commercial paper and Federal funds purchased and securities sold under agreements to repurchase.

financial.label: Long-Term Debt Interest Expense
financial.description: Aggregate amount of interest paid or due on all long-term debt.

financial.label: Federal Funds Purchased and Securities Sold Interest Expense
financial.description: The aggregate expense incurred on federal funds purchased and securities sold under agreements to repurchase. If amounts recognized as payables under repurchase agreements have been offset against amounts recognized as receivables under reverse repurchase agreements and reported as a net amount on the balance sheet, the income and expense from these agreements may be reported on a net basis.

financial.label: Capitalized Lease Obligations Interest Expense
financial.description: Amount of interest expense on finance lease liability.

financial.label: Other Interest Expense
financial.description: Amount of interest expense classified as other.

financial.label: Total Interest Expense
financial.description: Amount of interest expense classified as operating.

financial.label: Net Interest Income / (Expense)
financial.description: Amount of interest income (expense) classified as operating.

financial.label: Revenues Excluding Interest and Dividends
financial.description: Revenue excluding interest and dividend income (securities firms).

financial.label: Trust Fees by Commissions
financial.description: Revenue recognized in the period for (1) performance (incentive) fees based on the investment results achieved for management of certain institutional accounts and hedge funds, (2) schedule-based fees earned for management of mutual funds and closed-end funds, based either on average daily net assets or on a combination of the average daily net assets and gross income, and (3) other investment management and advisory fees.

financial.label: Service Charges on Deposit Accounts
financial.description: Includes amounts charged depositors for: (1) maintenance of their accounts (maintenance charges); (2) failure to maintain specified minimum balances on account; (3) exceeding the number of checks or transactions allowed to be processed in a given period; (4) checks drawn on no minimum balance deposit accounts; (5) withdrawals from nontransaction deposit accounts; (6) closing savings accounts before a specified minimum period of time has elapsed; (7) accounts which have remained inactive for extended periods of time or which have become dormant; (8) use of automated teller machines or remote service units; (9) checks drawn against insufficient funds that the bank assesses regardless of whether it decides to pay, return or hold the check; (10) issuing stop payment orders; (11) certifying checks; and (12) accumulating or disbursing funds deposited in IRAs or Keogh Plan accounts when not handled by the bank's trust department. This item does not include penalties assessed on the early withdrawal of time deposits.

financial.label: Other Service Charges
financial.description: Fee and commission revenue earned from sources not otherwise specified in the existing taxonomy.

financial.label: Net Realized & Unrealized Capital Gains on Investments
financial.description: Amount of realized and unrealized gain (loss) on investment.

financial.label: Premiums Earned
financial.description: Amount, after premiums ceded to other entities and premiums assumed by the entity, of premiums earned.

financial.label: Investment Banking Income
financial.description: Amount of fees and commissions from banking, advisory, brokerage, and securities underwriting activities. Activities include, but are not limited to, underwriting securities, private placements of securities, investment advisory and management services, merger and acquisition services, sale and servicing of mutual funds, and other related consulting fees.

financial.label: Other Non-Interest Income
financial.description: Represents the total of noninterest income derived from certain activities and assets including (for example): (1) venture capital investments; (2) bank owned life insurance; (3) foreign currency transactions; and (4) mortgage servicing rights.

financial.label: Total Non-Interest Income
financial.description: The total amount of noninterest income which may be derived from: (1) fees and commissions; (2) premiums earned; (3) insurance policy charges; (4) the sale or disposal of assets; and (5) other sources not otherwise specified.

financial.label: Other Revenue
financial.description: Other revenue not classified elsewhere.

financial.label: Net Interest Income After Provision for Loan Losses
financial.description: Amount of net interest income after provision for credit losses.

financial.label: Total Revenue
financial.description: Amount of revenue recognized from goods sold, services rendered, insurance premiums, or other activities that constitute an earning process. Includes, but is not limited to, investment and interest income before deduction of interest expense when recognized as a component of revenue, and sales and trading gain (loss).

financial.label: Provision for Credit Losses
financial.description: Amount of expense related to estimated loss from loan and lease transactions.

financial.label: Salaries and Employee Benefits
financial.description: Amount of expense for salary, wage, profit sharing; incentive and equity-based compensation; and other employee benefit.

financial.label: Net Occupancy & Equipment Expense
financial.description: Amount of net occupancy expense that may include items, such as depreciation of facilities and equipment, lease expenses, property taxes and property and casualty insurance expense.

financial.label: Marketing Expense
financial.description: The aggregate total amount of expenses directly related to the marketing or selling of products or services.

financial.label: Property & Liability Insurance Claims
financial.description: Amount, after effects of policies assumed or ceded, of expense related to the provision for policy benefits and costs incurred.

financial.label: Insurance Policy Acquisition Costs
financial.description: Amount of deferred policy acquisition cost capitalized on contract remaining in force.

financial.label: Amortization of Deferred Policy Acquisition Costs
financial.description: Amount of amortization expense (reversal of expense) for deferred policy acquisition costs.

financial.label: Current and Future Benefits
financial.description: Amount, after effect of policies assumed or ceded, of expense related to provision for policy benefits and costs incurred for health insurance contracts.

financial.label: Other Operating Expenses
financial.description: The net amount of other operating income and expenses, the components of which are not separately disclosed on the income statement, from items that are associated with the entity's normal revenue producing operations.

financial.label: Depreciation Expense
financial.description: The current period expense charged against earnings on long-lived, physical assets not used in production, and which are not intended for resale, to allocate or recognize the cost of such assets over their useful lives; or to record the reduction in book value of an intangible asset over the benefit period of such asset; or to reflect consumption during the period of an asset that is not used in production.

financial.label: Amortization Expense
financial.description: Amount of amortization expense for finite-lived intangible asset. Excludes goodwill and capitalized cost for software to be sold, leased, or marketed.

financial.label: Depreciation and Amortization
financial.description: The aggregate expense recognized in the current period that allocates the cost of tangible and intangible assets over their useful lives.

financial.label: Impairment Charge
financial.description: Amount of impairment loss for asset. Includes, but is not limited to, tangible and intangible assets and goodwill.

financial.label: Restructuring Charge
financial.description: Amount of expenses associated with exit or disposal activities pursuant to an authorized plan. Excludes expenses related to a discontinued operation or an asset retirement obligation.

financial.label: Other Special Charges
financial.description: Amount of restructuring charges, remediation cost, and asset impairment loss.

financial.label: Total Non-Interest Expense
financial.description: Total aggregate amount of all noninterest expense.

financial.label: Nonoperating Income / (Expense), net
financial.description: The aggregate amount of income or expense from ancillary business-related activities (that is to say, excluding major activities considered part of the normal operations of the business).

financial.label: Income Before Equity Method Investments
financial.description: Income before equity method investments.

financial.label: Income from Equity Method Investments
financial.description: Equity method investee's income.

financial.label: Total Pre-Tax Income
financial.description: Amount of income (loss) from continuing operations, including income (loss) from equity method investments, before deduction of income tax expense (benefit), and income (loss) attributable to noncontrolling interest.

financial.label: Current Income Tax Expense (Benefit)
financial.description: Current income tax expense.

financial.label: Deferred Income Tax Expense (Benefit)
financial.description: Deferred income tax expense.

financial.label: Income Tax Expense
financial.description: Amount of current income tax expense (benefit) and deferred income tax expense (benefit) pertaining to continuing operations.

financial.label: Net Income / (Loss) Continuing Operations
financial.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from continuing operations including portion attributable to the noncontrolling interest.

financial.label: Net Income / (Loss) Discontinued Operations
financial.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from a discontinued operation including the portion attributable to the noncontrolling interest. Includes, but is not limited to, the income (loss) from operations during the phase-out period, gain (loss) on disposal, gain (loss) for reversal of write-down (write-down) to fair value, less cost to sell, and adjustments to a prior period gain (loss) on disposal.

financial.label: Extraordinary Income / (Loss), net
financial.description: Description of the gains (losses), after tax, arising from an event or transaction that is both unusual in nature and infrequent in occurrence when considered in relation to the environment in which the entity operates and which represents the portion assigned to noncontrolling interest, if any. This amount is the income statement amount which is allocable to that ownership interest in subsidiary equity which is not attributable to the parent (noncontrolling interest, minority interest).

financial.label: Other Adjustments to Consolidated Net Income / (Loss)
financial.description: Amount after tax and reclassification adjustments of other comprehensive income (loss).

financial.label: Gain (Loss) on Sale of Properties, Net of Tax
financial.description: Gain/loss on sale of property.

financial.label: OCI Attributable to Parent
financial.description: OCI attributable to parent.

financial.label: Comprehensive Income (Loss) Attributable to Parent
financial.description: Comprehensive income attributable to parent.

financial.label: OCI Attributable to NCI
financial.description: OCI attributable to NCI.

financial.label: Comprehensive Income (Loss) Attributable to NCI
financial.description: Comprehensive income attributable to NCI.

financial.label: Comprehensive Income (Loss)
financial.description: Comprehensive income including NCI.

financial.label: Consolidated Net Income / (Loss)
financial.description: The consolidated profit or loss for the period, net of income taxes, including the portion attributable to the noncontrolling interest.

financial.label: Preferred Stock Dividends Declared
financial.description: Amount of paid and unpaid preferred stock dividends declared with the form of settlement in cash, stock and payment-in-kind (PIK).

financial.label: Net Income Attributable to Redeemable NCI
financial.description: Income attributable to redeemable NCI.

financial.label: Net Income Attributable to Nonredeemable NCI
financial.description: Income attributable to nonredeemable NCI.

financial.label: Net Income / (Loss) Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
financial.description: Amount of Net Income (Loss) attributable to noncontrolling interest.

financial.label: Other Adjustment to Net Income / (Loss) Attributable to Common Shareholders)
financial.description: The aggregate value of preferred stock dividends and other adjustments necessary to derive net income apportioned to common stockholders.

financial.label: Net Income / (Loss) Attributable to Common Shareholders
financial.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities; of income (loss) available to common shareholders.

financial.label: Weighted Average Basic Shares Outstanding
financial.description: Number of [basic] shares or units, after adjustment for contingently issuable shares or units and other shares or units not deemed outstanding, determined by relating the portion of time within a reporting period that common shares or units have been outstanding to the total time in that period.

financial.label: Basic Earnings per Share
financial.description: The amount of net income (loss) for the period per each share of common stock or unit outstanding during the reporting period.

financial.label: Weighted Average Diluted Shares Outstanding
financial.description: The average number of shares or units issued and outstanding that are used in calculating diluted EPS or earnings per unit (EPU), determined based on the timing of issuance of shares or units in the period.

financial.label: Diluted Earnings per Share
financial.description: The amount of net income (loss) for the period available to each share of common stock or common unit outstanding during the reporting period and to each share or unit that would have been outstanding assuming the issuance of common shares or units for all dilutive potential common shares or units outstanding during the reporting period.

financial.label: Weighted Average Basic & Diluted Shares Outstanding
financial.description: Average number of shares or units issued and outstanding that are used in calculating basic and diluted earnings per share (EPS).

financial.label: Basic & Diluted Earnings per Share
financial.description: The amount of net income or loss for the period per each share in instances when basic and diluted earnings per share are the same amount and reported as a single line item on the face of the financial statements.  Basic earnings per share is the amount of net income or loss for the period per each share of common stock or unit outstanding during the reporting period.  Diluted earnings per share includes the amount of net income or loss for the period available to each share of common stock or common unit outstanding during the reporting period and to each share or unit that would have been outstanding assuming the issuance of common shares or units for all dilutive potential common shares or units outstanding during the reporting period.

financial.label: Cash Dividends to Common per Share
financial.description: Aggregate dividends declared during the period for each share of common stock outstanding.

diversified.label: Selling, General & Admin Expense
diversified.description: The aggregate total costs related to selling a firm's product and services, as well as all other general and administrative expenses. Direct selling expenses (for example, credit, warranty, and advertising) are expenses that can be directly linked to the sale of specific products. Indirect selling expenses are expenses that cannot be directly linked to the sale of specific products, for example telephone expenses, Internet, and postal charges. General and administrative expenses include salaries of non-sales personnel, rent, utilities, communication, etc.

diversified.label: Marketing Expense
diversified.description: The aggregate total amount of expenses directly related to the marketing or selling of products or services.

diversified.label: Research & Development Expense
diversified.description: Amount of expense for research and development. Includes, but is not limited to, cost for computer software product to be sold, leased, or otherwise marketed and writeoff of research and development assets acquired in transaction other than business combination or joint venture formation or both. Excludes write-down of intangible asset acquired in business combination or from joint venture formation or both, used in research and development activity.

diversified.label: Exploration Expense
diversified.description: Exploration expenses (including prospecting) related to oil and gas producing entities and would be included in operating expenses of that entity. Costs incurred in identifying areas that may warrant examination and in examining specific areas that are considered to have prospects of containing oil and gas reserves, including costs of drilling exploratory wells and exploratory-type stratigraphic test wells. Exploration costs may be incurred both before acquiring the related property (sometimes referred to in part as prospecting costs) and after acquiring the property. Principal types of exploration costs, which include depreciation and applicable operating costs of support equipment and facilities and other costs of exploration activities, are: (i) Costs of topographical, geographical and geophysical studies, rights of access to properties to conduct those studies, and salaries and other expenses of geologists, geophysical crews, and others conducting those studies. Collectively, these are sometimes referred to as geological and geophysical or "G&G" costs. (ii) Costs of carrying and retaining undeveloped properties, such as delay rentals, ad valorem taxes on properties, legal costs for title defense, and the maintenance of land and lease records. (iii) Dry hole contributions and bottom hole contributions. (iv) Costs of drilling and equipping exploratory wells. (v) Costs of drilling exploratory-type stratigraphic test wells.

diversified.label: Depreciation Expense
diversified.description: The current period expense charged against earnings on long-lived, physical assets not used in production, and which are not intended for resale, to allocate or recognize the cost of such assets over their useful lives; or to record the reduction in book value of an intangible asset over the benefit period of such asset; or to reflect consumption during the period of an asset that is not used in production.

diversified.label: Amortization Expense
diversified.description: Amount of amortization expense for finite-lived intangible asset. Excludes goodwill and capitalized cost for software to be sold, leased, or marketed.

diversified.label: Depreciation and Amortization
diversified.description: The aggregate expense recognized in the current period that allocates the cost of tangible and intangible assets over their useful lives.

diversified.label: Depletion Expense
diversified.description: The noncash expense charged against earnings to recognize the consumption of natural resources.

diversified.label: Other Operating Expenses / (Income)
diversified.description: The net amount of other operating income and expenses, the components of which are not separately disclosed on the income statement, from items that are associated with the entity's normal revenue producing operations.

diversified.label: Impairment Charge
diversified.description: Amount of impairment loss for asset. Includes, but is not limited to, tangible and intangible assets and goodwill.

diversified.label: Restructuring Charge
diversified.description: Amount of expenses associated with exit or disposal activities pursuant to an authorized plan. Excludes expenses related to a discontinued operation or an asset retirement obligation.

diversified.label: Other Special Charges / (Income)
diversified.description: Amount of restructuring charges, remediation cost, and asset impairment loss.

diversified.label: Costs & Expenses
diversified.description: Total costs of sales and operating expenses for the period.

diversified.label: Operating Revenue
diversified.description: Amount of revenue recognized from goods sold, services rendered, insurance premiums, or other activities that constitute an earning process. Includes, but is not limited to, investment and interest income before deduction of interest expense when recognized as a component of revenue, and sales and trading gain (loss).

diversified.label: Other Revenue
diversified.description: Revenues from the sale of other goods or rendering of other services, not elsewhere specified in the taxonomy; net of (reduced by) sales adjustments, returns, allowances, and discounts.

diversified.label: Excise and Sales Taxes
diversified.description: Amount of excise and sales taxes.

diversified.label: Total Revenue
diversified.description: Amount of revenue recognized from goods sold, services rendered, insurance premiums, or other activities that constitute an earning process. Includes, but is not limited to, investment and interest income before deduction of interest expense when recognized as a component of revenue, and sales and trading gain (loss).

diversified.label: Total Operating Expenses
diversified.description: Generally recurring costs associated with normal operations.

diversified.label: Total Operating Income
diversified.description: The net result for the period of deducting operating expenses from operating revenues.

diversified.label: Interest Expense
diversified.description: Amount of interest expense classified as operating.

diversified.label: Interest & Investment Income
diversified.description: Amount of operating interest income, including, but not limited to, amortization and accretion of premiums and discounts on securities.

diversified.label: Other Income / (Expense), net
diversified.description: Amount of income (expense) related to nonoperating activities, classified as other.

diversified.label: Total Other Income / (Expense), net
diversified.description: The aggregate amount of income or expense from ancillary business-related activities (that is to say, excluding major activities considered part of the normal operations of the business).

diversified.label: Income Before Equity Method Investments
diversified.description: Amount before equity method investments.

diversified.label: Income from Equity Method Investments
diversified.description: Equity method investee's income (loss).

diversified.label: Total Pre-Tax Income
diversified.description: Amount of income (loss) from continuing operations, including income (loss) from equity method investments, before deduction of income tax expense (benefit), and income (loss) attributable to noncontrolling interest.

diversified.label: Current Income Tax Expense (Benefit)
diversified.description: Current income tax expense.

diversified.label: Deferred Income Tax Expense (Benefit)
diversified.description: Deferred income tax expense.

diversified.label: Income Tax Expense
diversified.description: Amount of current income tax expense (benefit) and deferred income tax expense (benefit) pertaining to continuing operations.

diversified.label: Net Income / (Loss) Continuing Operations
diversified.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from continuing operations including portion attributable to the noncontrolling interest.

diversified.label: Net Income / (Loss) Discontinued Operations
diversified.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from a discontinued operation including the portion attributable to the noncontrolling interest. Includes, but is not limited to, the income (loss) from operations during the phase-out period, gain (loss) on disposal, gain (loss) for reversal of write-down (write-down) to fair value, less cost to sell, and adjustments to a prior period gain (loss) on disposal.

diversified.label: Extraordinary Income / (Loss), net
diversified.description: Description of the gains (losses), after tax, arising from an event or transaction that is both unusual in nature and infrequent in occurrence when considered in relation to the environment in which the entity operates and which represents the portion assigned to noncontrolling interest, if any. This amount is the income statement amount which is allocable to that ownership interest in subsidiary equity which is not attributable to the parent (noncontrolling interest, minority interest).

diversified.label: Other Adjustments to Consolidated Net Income / (Loss)
diversified.description: Amount after tax and reclassification adjustments of other comprehensive income (loss).

diversified.label: Gain (Loss) on Sale of Properties, Net of Tax
diversified.description: Gain/loss on sale of property, net of tax.

diversified.label: OCI Attributable to Parent
diversified.description: Amount after tax of OCI attributable to parent.

diversified.label: Comprehensive Income (Loss) Attributable to Parent
diversified.description: Amount after tax, attributable to parent.

diversified.label: OCI Attributable to NCI
diversified.description: Amount after tax of OCI attributable to NCI.

diversified.label: Comprehensive Income (Loss) Attributable to NCI
diversified.description: Amount after tax, attributable to NCI.

diversified.label: Comprehensive Income (Loss)
diversified.description: Amount after tax of increase (decrease) in equity.

diversified.label: Consolidated Net Income / (Loss)
diversified.description: The consolidated profit or loss for the period, net of income taxes, including the portion attributable to the noncontrolling interest.

diversified.label: Preferred Stock Dividends Declared
diversified.description: Amount of paid and unpaid preferred stock dividends declared with the form of settlement in cash, stock and payment-in-kind (PIK).

diversified.label: Net Income Attributable to Redeemable NCI
diversified.description: Income attributable to redeemable NCI.

diversified.label: Net Income Attributable to Nonredeemable NCI
diversified.description: Income attributable to nonredeemable NCI.

diversified.label: Net Income / (Loss) Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
diversified.description: Amount of Net Income (Loss) attributable to noncontrolling interest.

diversified.label: Other Adjustments to Net Income / (Loss) Attributable to Common Shareholders)
diversified.description: The aggregate value of preferred stock dividends and other adjustments necessary to derive net income apportioned to common stockholders.

diversified.label: Net Income / (Loss) Attributable to Common Shareholders
diversified.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities; of income (loss) available to common shareholders.

diversified.label: Weighted Average Basic Shares Outstanding
diversified.description: Number of [basic] shares or units, after adjustment for contingently issuable shares or units and other shares or units not deemed outstanding, determined by relating the portion of time within a reporting period that common shares or units have been outstanding to the total time in that period.

diversified.label: Basic Earnings per Share
diversified.description: The amount of net income (loss) for the period per each share of common stock or unit outstanding during the reporting period.

diversified.label: Weighted Average Diluted Shares Outstanding
diversified.description: The average number of shares or units issued and outstanding that are used in calculating diluted EPS or earnings per unit (EPU), determined based on the timing of issuance of shares or units in the period.

diversified.label: Diluted Earnings per Share
diversified.description: The amount of net income (loss) for the period available to each share of common stock or common unit outstanding during the reporting period and to each share or unit that would have been outstanding assuming the issuance of common shares or units for all dilutive potential common shares or units outstanding during the reporting period.

diversified.label: Weighted Average Basic & Diluted Shares Outstanding
diversified.description: Average number of shares or units issued and outstanding that are used in calculating basic and diluted earnings per share (EPS).

diversified.label: Basic & Diluted Earnings per Share
diversified.description: The amount of net income or loss for the period per each share in instances when basic and diluted earnings per share are the same amount and reported as a single line item on the face of the financial statements.  Basic earnings per share is the amount of net income or loss for the period per each share of common stock or unit outstanding during the reporting period.  Diluted earnings per share includes the amount of net income or loss for the period available to each share of common stock or common unit outstanding during the reporting period and to each share or unit that would have been outstanding assuming the issuance of common shares or units for all dilutive potential common shares or units outstanding during the reporting period.

diversified.label: Cash Dividends to Common per Share
diversified.description: Aggregate dividends declared during the period for each share of common stock outstanding.

insurance.label: Other Gains / (Losses), net
insurance.description: Amount of realized and unrealized gain (loss) on investment.

insurance.label: Premiums Earned
insurance.description: Amount, after premiums ceded to other entities and premiums assumed by the entity, of premiums earned.

insurance.label: Net Realized & Unrealized Capital Gains on Investments
insurance.description: Amount of realized and unrealized gain (loss) on investment.

insurance.label: Investment Securities Interest Income
insurance.description: Amount of operating interest income, including amortization and accretion of premiums and discounts, on securities subject to state, federal and other income tax.

insurance.label: Interest and Dividend Income
insurance.description: Amount of operating interest and dividend income.

insurance.label: Other Non-Interest Income
insurance.description: Represents the total of noninterest income derived from certain activities and assets including (for example): (1) venture capital investments; (2) bank owned life insurance; (3) foreign currency transactions; and (4) mortgage servicing rights.

insurance.label: Other Revenue
insurance.description: Other revenue not classified elsewhere.

insurance.label: Total Revenue
insurance.description: Amount of revenue recognized from goods sold, services rendered, insurance premiums, or other activities that constitute an earning process. Includes, but is not limited to, investment and interest income before deduction of interest expense when recognized as a component of revenue, and sales and trading gain (loss).

insurance.label: Current and Future Benefits
insurance.description: Amount, after effect of policies assumed or ceded, of expense related to provision for policy benefits and costs incurred for health insurance contracts.

insurance.label: Property & Liability Insurance Claims
insurance.description: Amount, after effects of policies assumed or ceded, of expense related to the provision for policy benefits and costs incurred.

insurance.label: Insurance Policy Acquisition Costs
insurance.description: Amount of deferred policy acquisition cost capitalized on contract remaining in force.

insurance.label: Amortization of Deferred Policy Acquisition Costs
insurance.description: Amount of amortization expense (reversal of expense) for deferred policy acquisition costs.

insurance.label: Salaries and Employee Benefits
insurance.description: Amount of expense for salary, wage, profit sharing; incentive and equity-based compensation; and other employee benefit.

insurance.label: Depreciation Expense
insurance.description: The current period expense charged against earnings on long-lived, physical assets not used in production, and which are not intended for resale, to allocate or recognize the cost of such assets over their useful lives; or to record the reduction in book value of an intangible asset over the benefit period of such asset; or to reflect consumption during the period of an asset that is not used in production.

insurance.label: Amortization Expense
insurance.description: Amount of amortization expense for finite-lived intangible asset. Excludes goodwill and capitalized cost for software to be sold, leased, or marketed.

insurance.label: Depreciation and Amortization
insurance.description: The aggregate expense recognized in the current period that allocates the cost of tangible and intangible assets over their useful lives.

insurance.label: Selling, General & Admin Expense
insurance.description: The aggregate total costs related to selling a firm's product and services, as well as all other general and administrative expenses. Direct selling expenses (for example, credit, warranty, and advertising) are expenses that can be directly linked to the sale of specific products. Indirect selling expenses are expenses that cannot be directly linked to the sale of specific products, for example telephone expenses, Internet, and postal charges. General and administrative expenses include salaries of non-sales personnel, rent, utilities, communication, etc.

insurance.label: Marketing Expense
insurance.description: The aggregate total amount of expenses directly related to the marketing or selling of products or services.

insurance.label: Impairment Charge
insurance.description: Amount of impairment loss for asset. Includes, but is not limited to, tangible and intangible assets and goodwill.

insurance.label: Other Operating Expenses
insurance.description: The net amount of other operating income and expenses, the components of which are not separately disclosed on the income statement, from items that are associated with the entity's normal revenue producing operations.

insurance.label: Restructuring Charge
insurance.description: Amount of expenses associated with exit or disposal activities pursuant to an authorized plan. Excludes expenses related to a discontinued operation or an asset retirement obligation.

insurance.label: Other Special Charges / (Income)
insurance.description: Amount of restructuring charges, remediation cost, and asset impairment loss.

insurance.label: Interest Expense
insurance.description: Amount of interest expense classified as operating.

insurance.label: Provision for Credit Losses
insurance.description: Amount of expense related to estimated loss from loan and lease transactions.

insurance.label: Benefits, Costs & Expenses
insurance.description: The total amount of expense recognized during the period for future policy benefits, claims and claims adjustment costs, and for selling, general and administrative costs.

insurance.label: Non-Operating Income (Loss)
insurance.description: Amount of income (loss) related to nonoperating activities.

insurance.label: Income Before Equity Method Investments
insurance.description: Income before equity method investments.

insurance.label: Income from Equity Method Investments
insurance.description: Equity method investee's income.

insurance.label: Total Pre-Tax Income
insurance.description: Amount of income (loss) from continuing operations, including income (loss) from equity method investments, before deduction of income tax expense (benefit), and income (loss) attributable to noncontrolling interest.

insurance.label: Current Income Tax Expense (Benefit)
insurance.description: Current income tax expense.

insurance.label: Deferred Income Tax Expense (Benefit)
insurance.description: Deferred income tax expense.

insurance.label: Income Tax Expense
insurance.description: Amount of current income tax expense (benefit) and deferred income tax expense (benefit) pertaining to continuing operations.

insurance.label: Net Income / (Loss) Continuing Operations
insurance.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from continuing operations including portion attributable to the noncontrolling interest.

insurance.label: Net Income / (Loss) Discontinued Operations
insurance.description: Amount after tax of income (loss) from a discontinued operation including the portion attributable to the noncontrolling interest. Includes, but is not limited to, the income (loss) from operations during the phase-out period, gain (loss) on disposal, gain (loss) for reversal of write-down (write-down) to fair value, less cost to sell, and adjustments to a prior period gain (loss) on disposal.

insurance.label: Extraordinary Income / (Loss), net
insurance.description: Description of the gains (losses), after tax, arising from an event or transaction that is both unusual in nature and infrequent in occurrence when considered in relation to the environment in which the entity operates and which represents the portion assigned to noncontrolling interest, if any. This amount is the income statement amount which is allocable to that ownership interest in subsidiary equity which is not attributable to the parent (noncontrolling interest, minority interest).

insurance.label: Other Adjustments to Consolidated Net Income / (Loss)
insurance.description: Amount after tax and reclassification adjustments of other comprehensive income (loss).

insurance.label: Gain (Loss) on Sale of Properties, Net of Tax
insurance.description: Gain/loss on sale of property.

insurance.label: Gain (Loss) on Disposition of Stock in Subsidiary
insurance.description: Gain/loss on sale of stock in subsidiary or equity method investee.

insurance.label: OCI Attributable to Parent
insurance.description: OCI attributable to parent.

insurance.label: Comprehensive Income (Loss) Attributable to Parent
insurance.description: Comprehensive income attributable to parent.

insurance.label: OCI Attributable to NCI
insurance.description: OCI attributable to NCI.

insurance.label: Comprehensive Income (Loss) Attributable to NCI
insurance.description: Comprehensive income attributable to NCI.

insurance.label: Comprehensive Income (Loss)
insurance.description: Comprehensive income including NCI.

insurance.label: Consolidated Net Income / (Loss)
insurance.description: The consolidated profit or loss for the period, net of income taxes, including the portion attributable to the noncontrolling interest.

insurance.label: Preferred Stock Dividends Declared
insurance.description: Amount of paid and unpaid preferred stock dividends declared with the form of settlement in cash, stock and payment-in-kind (PIK).

insurance.label: Net Income Attributable to Redeemable NCI
insurance.description: Income attributable to redeemable NCI.

insurance.label: Net Income Attributable to Nonredeemable NCI
insurance.description: Income attributable to nonredeemable NCI.

insurance.label: Net Income / (Loss) Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest
insurance.description: Amount of Net Income (Loss) attributable to noncontrolling interest.

insurance.label: Other Adjustments to Net Income / (Loss) Attributable to Common Shareholders)
insurance.description: The aggregate value of preferred stock dividends and other adjustments necessary to derive net income apportioned to common stockholders.

insurance.label: Net Income / (Loss) Attributable to Common Shareholders
insurance.description: Amount, after deduction of tax, noncontrolling interests, dividends on preferred stock and participating securities; of income (loss) available to common shareholders.

insurance.label: Weighted Average Basic Shares Outstanding
insurance.description: Number of [basic] shares or units, after adjustment for contingently issuable shares or units and other shares or units not deemed outstanding, determined by relating the portion of time within a reporting period that common shares or units have been outstanding to the total time in that period.

insurance.label: Basic Earnings per Share
insurance.description: The amount of net income (loss) for the period per each share of common stock or unit outstanding during the reporting period.

insurance.label: Weighted Average Diluted Shares Outstanding
insurance.description: The average number of shares or units issued and outstanding that are used in calculating diluted EPS or earnings per unit (EPU), determined based on the timing of issuance of shares or units in the period.

insurance.label: Diluted Earnings per Share
insurance.description: The amount of net income (loss) for the period available to each share of common stock or common unit outstanding during the reporting period and to each share or unit that would have been outstanding assuming the issuance of common shares or units for all dilutive potential common shares or units outstanding during the reporting period.

insurance.label: Weighted Average Basic & Diluted Shares Outstanding
insurance.description: Average number of shares or units issued and outstanding that are used in calculating basic and diluted earnings per share (EPS).

insurance.label: Basic & Diluted Earnings per Share
insurance.description: The amount of net income or loss for the period per each share in instances when basic and diluted earnings per share are the same amount and reported as a single line item on the face of the financial statements.  Basic earnings per share is the amount of net income or loss for the period per each share of common stock or unit outstanding during the reporting period.  Diluted earnings per share includes the amount of net income or loss for the period available to each share of common stock or common unit outstanding during the reporting period and to each share or unit that would have been outstanding assuming the issuance of common shares or units for all dilutive potential common shares or units outstanding during the reporting period.

insurance.label: Cash Dividends to Common per Share
insurance.description: Aggregate dividends declared during the period for each share of common stock outstanding.
